programme.title: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Nate and Brooke are going to the same four weddings, four weekends in a row. To avoid set-ups, they go together as "wedding buddies." But what starts as a friendship soon becomes deeper. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: Perfumer Violet is desperate to formulate her late father's unfinished signature scent. Under great pressure to finish by Valentine's Day, Violet hires an inexperienced botanist with an uncanny ability to identify scents.

programme.title: All of My Heart
programme.desc: A young caterer's life suddenly changes when she inherits a country home and learns she must share it with a career-obsessed Wall Street trader. Sparks fly when they have to work side-by-side.

programme.title: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.title: All of My Heart: The Wedding
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are planning their wedding at the Inn where they fell in love. When a distant relative arrives and stakes their claim to the Inn, Brian and Jenny must find a way to save their beloved Inn or risk having to sell.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Stranded in Paradise
programme.desc: When a HR exec loses her job, she travels to Puerto Rico for a business conference. But as the trip becomes a disaster and a hurricane shuts down the whole island, she meets a handsome traveler who gives her a new perspective.

programme.title: June in January
programme.desc: A newly engaged bride's dream wedding is threatened by her scheming future mother-in-law, when a sudden change in plans pushes her perfect outdoor June wedding up to a wintry January date.

programme.title: The Beach House
programme.desc: When Cara finds her life spinning out of control, she returns to the scenic Lowcountry to visit her mother. Before long, the rhythms of the island open her heart in wonderful ways as she repairs the family beach house.

programme.title: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: Pampered Manhattan housewife Desiree Harper has it all. That is until her husband unexpectedly dumps her. Faced with an airtight prenup, Desiree reluctantly lands a job making cupcakes at her father's struggling bakery.

programme.title: Big Sky River
programme.desc: Tara needs to go back to Parable, Montana, the place that made her the happiest, in order to move forward after a messy divorce. Her handsome neighbor presents an unexpected twist. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier, Kavan Smith.

programme.title: The Magic of Ordinary Days
programme.desc: Pregnant out of wedlock, an educated young woman is pressured by her father into an arranged marriage with a lonely farmer in this drama set during WWII. Stars Keri Russell and Skeet Ulrich.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and become closer. The summer brings visions of the past that could forge a new path forward. Stars Sam Page, Sarah Drew and Amanda Schull.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Mystery 101: Pilot
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, English professor Amy uses her crime fiction expertise to unravel the case faster than detective Travis, who ends up working with Amy to catch the killer. Stars Jill Wagner, Kristoffer Polaha.

programme.title: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: Samantha's Montana ranch is her family's legacy, so when a developer shows up to buy it, Sam isn't interested. But as he tries to win her trust and her ranch, Sam finds he might also be winning her heart. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: Zachary Stone, a handsome bachelor with distaste for responsibility, sees his life change before his eyes when he decides to adopt a stray cat.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Back for the third installment, Frankie and Nate manage life on the vineyard and plan a wedding in secret! Stars Rachael Leigh Cook and Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Love to the Rescue
programme.desc: Two single parents come head to head when their kids want to adopt the same dog. Agreeing to co-foster, free-spirited Kate and type-A Eric must work together to find the dog's forever home. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Emma's daughter Kendall becomes engaged, but Emma is concerned as Kendall and her fiancé have Down Syndrome and Emma worries she's not ready to take this step. Stars Lily D. Moore, Erica Durance, Benjamin Ayres, David DeSanctis.

programme.title: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: Ally, a final contestant on a dating show, must face her high school sweetheart when she is chosen for the Hometown Date. Stars Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, & Jack Turner.

programme.title: The Royal We
programme.desc: When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea who has lived her life away from her royal duties must now step in and honor the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince. Stars Mallory Jansen, Charlie Carrick.

programme.title: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A fiercely independent single woman is forced to consider marrying her not-so-perfect boyfriend when a gypsy fortuneteller convinces her she must be engaged by the spring or risk a lifetime alone.

programme.title: Dating the Delaneys
programme.desc: Three generations of Delaney women explore the highs and lows of modern-day dating, learning that love and romance can be found at any age…and sometimes where you least expect it. Stars Rachel Boston and Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Falling Together
programme.desc: Natalie tries to bring feuding neighbors together in her new condo building. Her unexpected ally is the building's super who prefers to avoid getting involved. Stars Ashley Williams, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: Right in Front of Me
programme.desc: Carly has a second chance at romance with her college crush but is unable to impress him until her new friend Nick starts giving her advice. Soon she learns who the right man for her really is. Stars Janel Parrish, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Love on the Amazon
programme.desc: Claire travels to Brazil and hires Danny, a riverboat captain, to help her deliver an important message for her sister Amelia, a marine biologist studying pink dolphins on the Amazon River. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Rafael de la Fuente.

programme.title: Catch of the Day
programme.desc: On the eve of becoming a NY executive chef, Sophie returns home to help her family's flailing restaurant and runs into Cam, an old crush who makes her question everything. Stars Emilie Ullerup, Michael Rady, and Katie Lee Biegel.

programme.title: Summer Villa
programme.desc: A romance novelist with writer's block and a celebrity chef suffering from a bad review accidentally end up staying at the same French villa for the summer. A connection grows as they attempt to share the house.

programme.title: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: A Pinch of Portugal
programme.desc: When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. Stars Heather Hemmens, Luke Mitchell.

programme.title: Falling in Love in Niagara
programme.desc: After her fiancé leaves her before their wedding, MADELINE goes to Niagara Falls to honeymoon without him. There, she reconnects with her adventurous side, learns to let go, and finds new love. Stars Jocelyn Hudon, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: When an aspiring chef lands an assistant job at her idol's restaurant, she's convinced her big break is just around the corner. After a rocky start, she befriends the handsome executive chef and they begin bonding in the kitchen.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Sparks are reignited when a single mother and a pro football player coincidentally meet again on her daughter's flag football field after his career is interrupted by a sports injury. Stars Pascale Hutton, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Blind Date Book Club
programme.desc: A bookstore owner finds love and direction in life after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel in her blind-date-with-a-book club. Stars Erin Krakow, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: The Way to You
programme.desc: New Yorkers Emma and Conrad agree to help each other find their missed connections after a subway blackout. Their search might lead to love, but not where either of them expects to find it. Stars Kim Matula, Aaron O'Connell.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition while the competition tries to win her heart. Stars Natalie Hall and Michael Rady.

programme.title: Romance in Style
programme.desc: Ella's unique designs inspire publishing mogul Derek to include plus-sized fashion in his magazine. Soon, Derek begins to realize that Ella's influence reaches far beyond the catwalk. Stars Jaicy Elliot, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Make Me a Match
programme.desc: Vivi enlists the help of an Indian Matchmaker, Raina, to change her fate in love. However, Raina's son Bhumesh just might be the change Vivi needed all along. Stars Rushi Kota and Eva Bourne.

programme.title: Return to Office
programme.desc: After making the return to the office on a hybrid schedule, two coworkers known to each other only as Ms. Monday and Mr. Tuesday start sending friendly notes, sparking an office romance. Stars Janel Parrish, Scott Michael Foster.

programme.title: A Reason for the Season
programme.desc: In order to earn her trust fund and with the help of a handsome local attorney, Evie is tasked with granting Christmas wishes to the people who saved her life on the night of her birth. Stars Taylor Cole and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: Five Gold Rings
programme.desc: An artist returns home for the holidays and gets tasked with a Christmas quest left by her grandmother. She and the local PI must return lost items to their owners before Christmas. Starring Nolan Gerard Funk and Holland Roden.

programme.title: The Christmas Charade
programme.desc: Facing another dull Christmas alone, sparks fly when a risk-averse librarian accidentally gets wrapped up with a grinchy FBI agent in an undercover mission to save the Heart of Christmas. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: My Christmas Family Tree
programme.desc: When Vanessa receives the results from her Family Tree DNA test, she discovers a family she didn't know existed and travels to their home for Christmas. Starring Aimee Teegarden, Andrew Walker, and James Tupper.

programme.title: Oy to the World!
programme.desc: Nikki, a perfectionist, must reconnect with her childhood rival, Jake, an aspiring musician, as the duo unites choirs for a performance honoring Christmas and Hanukkah. Starring Brooke D'Orsay, and Jake Epstein.

programme.title: Scouting For Christmas
programme.desc: A single mom tries to make her daughter's Christmas special since her dad is working overseas for the holidays. She partners with her daughter's favorite baker for the Holiday Ball. Starring Tamera Mowry-Housley and Carlo Marks.

programme.title: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: Hoping to spend the holiday relaxing, a travel writer takes a traditional Christmas vacation for the first time. Through a rental mix up, she finds herself double booked for the holiday. Stars Bridget Regan, Travis Van Winkle.

programme.title: The Santa Summit
programme.desc: At a Santa themed holiday event, three teachers get their groove back, strengthen their friendship, and unexpectedly find love along the way. Stars Hunter King, Ben Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Holiday Touchdown: A Chiefs Love Story (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Chiefs superfan Alana tries to win the Fan of the Year Award as a Christmas gift for her family, falling in love with someone in the Chiefs front office along the way. Stars Hunter King, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas on Call
programme.desc: The lives of First Responders in Philadelphia intersect over the holiday season while juggling work, personal lives, and their dedication to protect and serve their city. Stars Sara Canning, Ser'Darius Blain.

programme.title: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked to create a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel. Stars Mallory Jansen and Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: Steven recruits holiday coordinator Gretchen to bring Christmas joy to his family. Neither expected the Christmas spirit to bring them closer to each other. Stars Alexa PenaVega and Jonathan Bennett.

programme.title: The Christmas Cup
programme.desc: Marine Kelly leads her hometown team in the Christmas Cup against the neighboring town with help from Fireman Quinn. That is until he becomes the competition. Starring Rhiannon Fish and Ben Rosenbaum.

programme.title: Christmas Under the Lights
programme.desc: Emily reluctantly returns home to her family's rescue ranch to organize the Christmas Carnival and works with a handsome artist to honor her mother. Starring Heather Hemmens, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: A Merry Scottish Christmas
programme.desc: When estranged siblings, Lindsay and Brad Morgan travel to Scotland at Christmas to reunite with their mother Jo, a big family secret is revealed. Lacey Chabert, Scott Wolf.

programme.title: The Royal Nanny
programme.desc: MI5 agent Claire goes undercover as the royal nanny, and must overcome the challenges of her assignment, like resisting the charms of Prince Colin while keeping the family safe at Christmas. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Christmas Cookie Catastrophe
programme.desc: Annie faces her first obstacle as CEO of Cooper's Cookies when grandma's secret recipe is stolen. While investigating the theft, she works with local baker Sam to recreate the beloved recipe. Stars Rachel Boston, Victor Webster.

programme.title: Mystery on Mistletoe Lane
programme.desc: New to town, Heidi Wicks and her kids discover a Christmas mystery in their historic home. Local handyman and historian David helps along the way, finding his own surprising connection. Starring Victor Webster and Erica Cerra.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 1
programme.desc: Christmas shop owner Emily Lane uses secret skills to investigate a murder when a poisoned cookie links her to the crime. Detective Sam Wilner navigates the holidays with daughter Violet. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Poison in a Pear Tree - Part 2
programme.desc: With time running out to prove her friend's innocence, Emily puts her own secret past on the line to find the real tree farm killer, raising suspicion from Detective Sam Wilner. Stars Sarah Drew and Peter Mooney.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Concrete Evidence
programme.desc: When Mac first moved to Lighthouse Cove, he bought the historic lighthouse mansion that the town is named after. During renovation demolition, the bones of a teenage girl were discovered. Stars Jewel and Colin Ferguson.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: Shannon Hughes has taken on a charity project renovating an old Victorian mansion. When a local banker is found murdered inside, Shannon must dust off the clues and cement the truth before her renovation becomes a demolition.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Riddled with Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief, and also... a murderer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe, Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Ships in the Night: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When an art gallery robbery leads to the death of the contemptible gallery manager, former Boston detective teams up with local doctor--and old flame-- to catch the killer. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Poisoned in Paradise: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: When a local waitress is found dead on the beach and a mysterious deposit appears in Zee's bank account, Martha's Vineyard proves to be all but the simple, scenic life Jeff Jackson was after. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind.

programme.title: Mystery Island: Pilot
programme.desc: When a visit to a mystery-themed resort goes wrong, a local detective and a vacationing British criminal psychiatrist team up to solve a real murder. Starring Elizabeth Henstridge, Charlie Weber.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Murder in G Major
programme.desc: A new teacher at an Irish prep school is shocked to find a ghost haunting her house. She decides to help solve his murder in the hopes that it will allow him to move on. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Buried at C
programme.desc: Our favorite music teacher Gethsemane is back again along with her trusted ghost friend Eamon to solve the unexplained death of a sea captain. Stars Tamera Mowry-Housley, Risteard Cooper, and Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: The Cases of Mystery Lane: Pilot
programme.desc: Birdie and Alden Case find a way to keep the mystery in their marriage alive, literally, when the amateur sleuths are pulled into a murder investigation. Stars Aimee Garcia, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: The Cases of Mystery Lane: Death is Listening
programme.desc: As Birdie and Alden Case's relationship strengthens, they discover a mutual interest for True Crime. But when their favorite podcaster is found dead, it is up to The Cases to listen to the clues. Stars Aimee Garcia, Paul Campbell.

programme.title: To Catch a Spy
programme.desc: A travel writer witnesses a murder at a hotel in Malta and becomes ensnared in a web of intrigue and espionage as she tries to find the killer before the killer finds her. Stars Nathalie Kelley, Colin Donnell and Patti Murin.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: A Bone to Pick
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane dies and leaves Aurora everything in her will, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Real Murders
programme.desc: Aurora finds a member of her crime buff group, the Real Murders Club, killed in a manner that eerily resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other brutal "copycat" killings follow, Aurora will have to investigate.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Three Bedrooms, One Corpse
programme.desc: When Aurora pitches in to help her busy real estate mother she quickly realizes she has again walked into a life or death situation. She investigates when the body of a local realtor is found strangled in a backyard.

programme.title: Tipline Mysteries: Dial 1 for Murder
programme.desc: A cryptic call about a planned jewelry heist draws a Detroit Free Press tipline operator, Maddie Moore, into a dangerous homicide case alongside a newly promoted detective. Stars Holland Roden and Chris McNally.

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: When advice columnist NELLY finds her childhood friend DAHLIA's boyfriend dead, she joins DETECTIVE HOGAN to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes a prime suspect. Stars Pascale Hutton, Kavan Smith.

programme.title: Redemption in Cherry Springs
programme.desc: After fallout from a story, reporter Melanie goes home to Cherry Springs for a break. When a friend disappears, she uses her skills to get to the truth, to the local detective's dismay. Stars Rochelle Aytes and Keith Robinson.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Chocolate Chip Cookie Mystery
programme.desc: Free spirited cookie baker Hannah Swensen jumps in to help a handsome new detective track down the culprit and uncover the mystery surrounding the death of her friend and local milk delivery man. Stars Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: When a murder takes place at the local Christmas tree carnival, it seems there are quite a few suspects. With the twelve days of Christmas ticking away, Hannah's running out of time to nab a murderous Scrooge.
